channel.title: Tesla Daily
channel.description: Tesla, EVs & Autonomous Driving Weekly Podcast
channel.itunes:author: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Tesla Semi Production Ignites Amid FSD and Sales Gains
item.description: This episode covers the start of high-volume Tesla Semi production, FSD v14.3.2 rollout to HW4 vehicles, Tesla Insurance expansion to Florida and Maryland, strong April sales rebound in Europe, and progress on Optimus factory and AI5 chip.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers the start of high-volume Tesla Semi production, FSD v14.3.2 rollout to HW4 vehicles, Tesla Insurance expansion to Florida and Maryland, strong April sales rebound in Europe, and progress on Optimus factory and AI5 chip.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Boom and Semi Order Surge Drive May
item.description: This episode details Tesla securing a record $100M Semi order, expanding unsupervised robotaxis across Texas, hitting 10 billion FSD miles, stock climbing above $410 on China sales rebound, major recalls, Optimus valuation insights, and energy storage pipeline growth.
item.itunes:summary: This episode details Tesla securing a record $100M Semi order, expanding unsupervised robotaxis across Texas, hitting 10 billion FSD miles, stock climbing above $410 on China sales rebound, major recalls, Optimus valuation insights, and energy storage pipeline growth.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy
